Ntc Of Continued Hearing Date On Mtn To Compel Plt To Provide Further Responses To Req. For Production, Set One By Deft And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf And Or Its Attorney Of Record
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant AGI CAPITAL GROUP, INC's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Request For Production, Set One, is granted in part and denied in part.

The motion is granted as to No. 2 as Plaintiff is ordered to respond further verifying that all documents have been produced with the exception of communications between plaintiff and its attorneys. No privilege log is required as to any other documents for which privilege is being asserted.

The motion is granted as to No. 4 as the objection is overruled and ordered stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to verify that all responsive documents relating to the work it did for Defendant at the property have been produced.

The motion is denied as to Nos. 12-14. The responses and production are sufficient.

Further response and production shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
